pageContext.name: Batman (Comic Color Version)
pageContext.description: It's not just a signal; it's a warning. –Batman  Keep an eye out for the Bat-Signal! Focused on the early years of the Caped Crusader's rise of crime-fighting, DC's next blockbuster The Batman will offer the younger version of Batman who swore to take a stand against the forces of evil. To prepare fans for the movie's official release, Sideshow and Hot Toys presents a new series of Cosbaby that recreates your favorite characters as stylish displays! Each Cosbaby stands approximately 9–12.5cm tall with a rotatable head.  The Batman (Comic Color Version) Cosbaby Collectible Figure brings forth the hero donning comic-inspired colors specially applied with luminous reflective effects. The luminous reflective effect can be activated by UV black light torch (not included).  Join the fight with The Batman Cosbaby DC collection!
